brief_notes: Impressive multifaceted study combining RNA-seq, chronic chemogenetics, behavioral battery, and immunohistochemistry. Tables provide detailed quantitative data: GSEA NES/FDR values, behavioral measures with means/SEMs/significance markers, and comprehensive glial morphology parameters across age groups. The age-dependent dissociation (working memory only in old mice, extinction only in young) is well-documented. The NeuN negative result (no neuronal death) is important and properly reported. Strong experimental design with appropriate controls.
